title: Red Sea Combined Fish and Benthic Transect Survey Data (2008-2011)
abstract: Combined fish and benthic transect survey dataset covering northern Red Sea reef sites around Al Wajh Bank (including sites named 'Wajh' and 'Screw Loose 1/2/3'). Contains two parallel worksheets -- a raw transect-by-taxon sheet and a zero-filled version (absent taxa recorded as zero rather than omitted) -- plus a site/locations lookup sheet. Covers reef fish counts and benthic cover/functional-group categories (corals, algae, sponges, substrate types).

variables.name: Site
variables.label: Site Name
variables.description: Named survey site, e.g. Wajh, Screw Loose 1/2/3, Wajh Bank.

variables.name: Date
variables.label: Survey Date
variables.description: Transect survey date (Excel serial date; observed range 2008-05-18 to 2011-07-17).

variables.name: Taxon/category columns
variables.label: Fish and Benthic Taxon Counts/Cover
variables.description: Wide-format columns (extending to column OC, ~93 columns) for individual fish taxa counts and benthic categories (e.g. Nepthea, Xeniidae, sponges, macroalgae genera, coralline algae, sand, silt).

access.how_to_request: Not independently verified; assumed to require the same access process as other KAUST Ecological-domain field survey products pending confirmation with the data steward.

provenance.originator: KAUST (originating research group/PI not identified in the file)

known_issues: Originating PI/research group not identified from the file itself; 'SAKMEO' is a plausible but unconfirmed attribution and should be verified -- this predates the SAKMEO-branded 2014-2023 dataset in this same folder and may be from a different program (e.g. an earlier KAUST or Red Sea Global-adjacent survey).
Read via raw XLSX XML parsing; column headers not exhaustively enumerated -- verify site coordinates and full variable list against the actual workbook.
The zero-filled sheet duplicates the raw sheet's row count, suggesting a processing/cleaning step was applied on top of raw field sheets.
Relationship to 'Fish Survey Data SAKMEO _DC Sep2025.xlsx' not established (different time period and apparently different site set -- Wajh Bank here vs. Farasan/central sites there).
